title: stirlingia seselifolia
intro: Stirlingia seselifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Alangium, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stirlingia seselifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Stirlingia seselifolia may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
